title: tricalysia jasminiflora var. jasminiflora
intro: Tricalysia jasminiflora var. jasminiflora is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tricalysia jasminiflora var. jasminiflora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin care. Tricalysia jasminiflora var. jasminiflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
